channel.title: Business on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Business on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Strictly VC Returns to NYC, Celebrating Startup Surge
item.description: Strictly VC returns to NYC Sep 10, highlighting $1.13 B seed funding, larger rounds, and top AI leaders speaking at Ideal Glass Studios in Manhattan.

item.title: David Beckham's IM8 Gets $1B Funding
item.description: David Beckham's health drink startup IM8 takes $1B funding from General Catalyst's CVF fund

item.title: Seeds of Monopoly
item.description: Patent holders on seeds stifle innovation and competition in agriculture

item.title: Prime Day Live Deals
item.description: Get the best Prime Day deals and discounts on top products with our live blog coverage and expert analysis

item.title: Uber Board Sued Over Alleged Oversight Failures
item.description: Uber shareholders sue board for alleged poor oversight leading to passenger sexual abuse, compliance failures, and legal risks.

item.title: Lucid Motors Cuts 18% Workforce: EV Market Struggles
item.description: Lucid Motors slashes 18% of its workforce amid EV market cooldown, aiming to simplify operations and boost competitiveness under new CEO Silvio Napoli.

item.title: Founder Summit 2026: Early Bird Savings & Growth
item.description: Discover how TechCrunch’s Founder Summit 2026 accelerates startup growth, offers early‑bird discounts, and connects founders with top investors.

item.title: Apple TV’s Original Vision: Steve Jobs’ Legacy Lives On
item.description: Eddy Cue reveals how Steve Jobs’ ethos shaped Apple TV’s strategy, rejecting library buys for original content. A deep dive into Apple’s vision.

item.title: Priceline Promo Codes: Save Big on Summer Travel 2026
item.description: Unlock exclusive Priceline promo codes for 2026 summer travel. Save up to 60% on hotels, flights, and car rentals with expert tips and deals.

item.title: UK's Political Turmoil: Starmer's Shock Resignation Explained
item.description: Keir Starmer resigns as UK PM after just two years, marking the sixth leadership change in a decade. Analyzing the fallout and what comes next.
